alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with experience scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; built strategic relationships across cross-functional stakeholders
alignments.job_requirement: Form successful relationships with clients throughout Vietnam, providing technical and business value

alignments.candidate_evidence: Documented experience in transformation programs and commercial operations, implying stakeholder and cross-team collaboration
alignments.job_requirement: Develop customer relationships and build internal partnerships with account executives and teams

alignments.candidate_evidence: No demonstrated background in big data analytics, data science, Spark, or data platforms
alignments.job_requirement: Expert in big data analytics to excite customers about Databricks platform

alignments.candidate_evidence: Python basic and actively learning; no production software-engineering background or coding experience cited
alignments.job_requirement: Prior experience with coding in a core programming language (Python, Java, Scala) and willingness to learn Spark

alignments.candidate_evidence: No background in data analytics, proofs-of-concept, or cloud platform engineering work
alignments.job_requirement: Proficient with Big Data Analytics technologies with hands-on expertise in complex proofs-of-concept and public cloud platforms

alignments.candidate_evidence: Native German and professional English; no Vietnamese language capability mentioned
alignments.job_requirement: Proficiency in Vietnamese language required for direct customer communications in Vietnam

gaps.gap: No big data analytics, data platform, or Spark expertise; role requires deep product and architecture knowledge
gaps.mitigation: Would require 6-12 months of intensive technical ramp-up on Databricks platform, data architecture, and big data concepts; limited evidence of technical learning velocity in this domain

gaps.gap: Limited hands-on coding experience (Python basic, no production background); role explicitly requires core programming language proficiency
gaps.mitigation: Candidate would need to develop functional coding ability for PoCs and demonstrations; actively learning Python but no timeline or depth specified

gaps.gap: No documented public cloud platform (AWS, GCP, Azure) hands-on expertise; role requires proficiency with complex cloud architectures
gaps.mitigation: Cloud fundamentals could be learned, but combined with coding and Spark gaps, ramp time extends significantly

gaps.gap: No Vietnamese language capability; role states Vietnamese proficiency is required for direct customer communications
gaps.mitigation: Language barrier eliminates ability to serve Vietnam-based clients directly; would require translation support or reassignment of customer interaction responsibilities

gaps.gap: Field Engineering and Solutions Architecture are not in target or approved-stretch families; candidate background is Strategy & Operations, not FDE/technical implementation
gaps.mitigation: Role is fundamentally outside candidate's positioning and core competency areas; function fit is poor regardless of technical ramp

output.level_rationale: Solutions Architect roles at mature, well-funded companies (Databricks is 10,000+ customer base, 50%+ Fortune 500) typically span L4–L5: 4–7 years of relevant domain expertise (data/cloud), technical depth in a specialist domain, and account-level relationship ownership. JD emphasizes hands-on technical PoCs, architecture design, and regional advisory scope (Vietnam), suggesting L4 base with possible L5 upside depending on hiring bar. No management scope. reporting line not stated.
output.summary: Solutions Architect at Databricks is a deeply technical, domain-specialist field engineering role requiring big data analytics, Spark, public cloud, and hands-on coding expertise—none of which align with the candidate's Strategy & Operations and transformation background. The candidate lacks mandatory Vietnamese language fluency, production coding experience, data platform knowledge, and field engineering positioning. While the candidate has strong relationship-building and cross-team collaboration experience, the technical and functional fit is fundamentally misaligned. This role falls outside target and approved-stretch families and is not a viable opportunity.
uncertainties: Company size/stage context for role level is stated in JD but seniority floor (L4 vs. L5) depends on hiring bar for technical depth
Candidate's Python learning trajectory and depth unknown; 'basic and actively learning' does not quantify pace or intended proficiency level
Whether candidate has any exposure to cloud platforms (GCP, AWS, Azure) through Google or transformation work is not explicit in profile
